value.stringValue: Looks like you have not added the correct supporting information
Looks like you have not added the correct supporting information
Looks like you have not added the correct supporting information
Looks like you have not added the correct supporting information
Failed to save, country must not be United Kingdom
Failed to save, you must have been a resident for at least 6 months

Flow.description: PT1-1405 - Wording updates to RMG security consent form
Flow.label: Vetting and Compliance - RMG - SCCF

fields.name: LogoText_0_0_0
Header_Text_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
In confidence

SECURITY CHECKS CONSENT FORM


You have indicated your forename/surname have changed in the past. Please use the buttons below to add relevant details

fields.name: First_Name_Text
fields.fieldText: Added Forename(s)

fields.name: Surname_Text
fields.fieldText: Added Surname(s)

fields.name: LogoText_0_0_0_0
Header_Text_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
In confidence

SECURITY CHECKS CONSENT FORM

fields.name: Previous_First_Name
fields.fieldText: What was your previous forename?

fields.name: First_Name_Changed
fields.fieldText: What date did this change?

fields.name: LogoText_0_0_0_0_0
Header_Text_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
In confidence

SECURITY CHECKS CONSENT FORM

fields.name: Previous_Surname
fields.fieldText: What was your previous surname?

fields.name: Surname_Changed
fields.fieldText: What date did this change?

fields.name: LogoText_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
Header_Text_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
In confidence

SECURITY CHECKS CONSENT FORM

fields.name: Nationality_Changed_Date
fields.fieldText: What date did your nationality change?

fields.name: LogoText_0_0_0_0_0_0
Header_Text_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
In confidence

SECURITY CHECKS CONSENT FORM


You have indicated your nationality has changed in the past. Please use the button below to add all previous nationality's

fields.name: LogoText_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
Header_Text_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
In confidence

SECURITY CHECKS CONSENT FORM

fields.name: Address_Line_1
fields.fieldText: Address Line 1

fields.name: Address_Line_2
fields.fieldText: Address Line 2

fields.name: Postal_Town
fields.fieldText: Postal Town

fields.name: Postcode
fields.fieldText: Postcode

fields.name: Move_Out_Date
fields.fieldText: Date moved out: {!Resident_Until_Var}

fields.name: Resident_at_this_Address_from
fields.fieldText: When did you move into this address?

validationRule.errorMessage: This date must be before the "Resident at this Address until" date

fields.name: LogoText_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
Header_Text_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
In confidence

SECURITY CHECKS CONSENT FORM


As you have indicated you have not been at your current address for 5 years you need to provide a full address history to cover the past 5 years.


You have currently covered the past {!Day_Converted_Years} years

fields.name: LogoText_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
Header_Text_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
In confidence

SECURITY CHECKS CONSENT FORM

value.stringValue: Which country where you living in?

fields.name: Resident_Start
fields.fieldText: When did you start living in the above country?

fields.name: Resident_End
fields.fieldText: When did you stop living in the above country?

fields.name: LogoText_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
Header_Text_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
In confidence

SECURITY CHECKS CONSENT FORM


You have indicated you have been a resident of a country outside of the UK for 6+ months in the last 5 years. Please ensure below all previous residency's are added:

fields.name: Header_Text
fields.fieldText:
In confidence

SECURITY CHECKS CONSENT FORM

Royal Mail Group will undertake mandatory security checks on applicants in accordance with company policy, the Prevailing Data Protection Legislation, the Police Act 1997, the Rehabilitation of Offenders Act 1974, and the Good Friday Agreement.


Individual Personal Data

Any information you cannot edit will need to be changed by your Blue Arrow consultant

fields.name: First_Name
fields.fieldText: First Name

fields.name: MiddleName
fields.fieldText: MiddleName

fields.name: Last_Name
fields.fieldText: Last Name

fields.name: I_confirm_I_do_not_have_a_middle_name
fields.fieldText: I confirm I do not have a middle name

fields.name: Candidate_Name
fields.fieldText:
Email: {!Get_Candidate.Email}

Date of Birth: {!Get_Candidate.Birthdate}

National Insurance Number: {!Get_Candidate.sirenum__National_Insurance__c}

value.stringValue: Has your Forename or Surname changed in the past?

fields.name: Mother_s_Forename_at_time_of_her_birth
fields.fieldText: What was your Mother's Forename at the time of their birth?

fields.name: Mother_s_Surname_at_time_of_her_birth
fields.fieldText: What was your Mother's Surname at the time of their birth?

value.stringValue: Which Country where you born in?

fields.name: Town_of_Birth
fields.fieldText: Which Town where you born in?

value.stringValue: Have you previously had any change in your Nationality?

fields.name: Current_Address
fields.fieldText:
Current Address:

{!Get_Candidate.MailingStreet}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingCity}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingState}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingPostalCode}

value.stringValue: Have you been a resident in a single country outside of the UK continuously for 6 months or more within the last 5 years?

fields.name: What_date_did_you_move_into_your_current_address
fields.fieldText: What date did you move into your current address?

validationRule.errorMessage: This date must be before todays date

fields.name: Header_Text_0
fields.fieldText:
In confidence

SECURITY CHECKS CONSENT FORM


Criminal Record Information

A Criminal Conviction means any offence that you where found guilty of committing by Court or Court Martial including motoring offences even if you did not attend. Answering 'yes' does not mean that Royal Mail Group cannot consider you for the role. Please note you should declare any motoring offences which resulted in fines, points on your Driving License in the last 5 years or custodial sentences which remain unspent in line with the Rehabilitation of Offenders act 1974

value.stringValue: Have you ever been convicted of any criminal offence which is currently unspent?

fields.name: Criminal_Conviction_Nature
fields.fieldText: What was the nature of the offence?

fields.name: Criminal_Conviction_Date
fields.fieldText: What was the date of the offence?

fields.name: Criminal_Conviction_Sentance
fields.fieldText: What was the sentence or court order?

value.stringValue: Do you have any Impending Prosecutions including motoring offences?

fields.name: Impending_Nature
fields.fieldText: What was the nature of the offence you are being charged with?

value.stringValue: Have you been convicted of a motoring offence within the last 5 years? (This includes Penalty Points)

fields.name: Motoring_Nature
fields.fieldText: What was the nature of the motoring offence?

fields.name: Motoring_date
fields.fieldText: What was the date of the motoring offence?

fields.name: Motoring_Sentance
fields.fieldText: What was the sentence or court order

fields.name: Header_Text_0_0
fields.fieldText:
In confidence

SECURITY CHECKS CONSENT FORM

I acknowledge that Royal Mail Group (RMG) will carry out an eligibility check and security checks, including a basic disclosure check through The Disclosure & Barring Service, Disclosure Scotland or Access Northern Ireland using the data supplied during this application; and these security checks may be audited by RMG or a third party that is approved by RMG (personal data will be exchanged electronically between this parties).A basic disclosure certificate will contain information about any unspent convictions held in your name or confirm that no such unspent convictions exist.


Further information on basic disclosures can be found at Disclosure&Barring Service, Disclosure Scotland and Access Northern Ireland.


Any consent given will last for a period of twelve months from the date of this application.


Please follow the link below and review the list of offences which would be deemed as unacceptable to Royal Mail Group and therefore prevent us from taking your application further.


Criminal Convictions - List of Unacceptable (royalmailgroup.com)


Should any of the listed convictions be identified as part of the basic disclosure check, your certificate will be reviewed, and your offer of employment may be withdrawn.


Royal Mail Group has an ex-offender’s policy, which is available on request by contacting hrsc.security.vetting@royalmail.com if required (please note this email address will only be able to respond to request for this policy).


Please read the below statements:


  • I can confirm I am the person listed in this application and have provided complete and true information in support of the application and I understand that knowingly making a false statement for this purpose is a criminal offence.
  • I consent for RMG to receive and open my basic disclosure certificate prior to me seeing it, for the purpose of assessing my application for employment and other recruitment management purposes. Where applicable, I give consent for RMG to assess and retain a copy of my Overseas Criminal Record Check provided by me.
  • I have read the Basic DBS Check Privacy Policy for applicants and I understand how DBS will process my personal data.
  • I consent to the DBS providing an electronic result directly to the responsible organisation that has submitted my application. I understand that an electronic result contains a message that indicates either the certificate does not contain criminal record information or to await certificate which will indicate that my certificate contains criminal record information. In some cases the responsible organisation may provide this information directly to my employer prior to me receiving my certificate. I understand if I do not consent to an electronic result being issued to the responsible organisation submitting my application that I must not proceed with this application and I should apply directly to DBS Request a basic DBS check - GOV.UK (www.gov.uk). I understand that to withdraw my consent whilst my application is in progress, I must contact the DBS helpline 03000 200 190. My application will then be withdrawn.
  • Following the above statement, I understand that should I wish NOT to provide consent I will contact my employer to withdraw my application.
  • I acknowledge that a copy of my Basic Disclosure Certificate will be retained in line with RMG’s retention guidelines or in my personnel file if deemed a requirement for the role under current CAA regulations. *UK Single Consolidated Direction, Chapter 11 (Recruitment & Training). Further information in relation to current CAA regulations can be found at: https://www.caa.co.uk/Commercial-industry/Security/Regulation/Criminal-record-checks/

value.stringValue: In order to proceed you must agree with the above statements

textTemplates.name: DocumentText
textTemplates.text:
SECURITY CHECKS CONSENT FORM

Status: Completed

Completed Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}

Royal Mail Group will undertake mandatory security checks on applicants in accordance with company policy, the Prevailing Data Protection Legislation, the Police Act 1997, the Rehabilitation of Offenders Act 1974, and the Good Friday Agreement.


Individual Personal Data

Salutation: {!Get_Candidate.Salutation}

Forename: {!First_Name}

Middle Name: {!MiddleName}

Surname: {!Last_Name}

Email: {!Get_Candidate.Email}

Date of Birth: {!Get_Candidate.Birthdate}

National Insurance Number: {!Get_Candidate.sirenum__National_Insurance__c}

Have you Forename or Surname changed in the past?

{!Name_Change.value}

Mothers Maiden Forename: {!Mother_s_Forename_at_time_of_her_birth}

Mothers Maiden Surname:{!Mother_s_Surname_at_time_of_her_birth}

Country of Birth: {!Birth_Country.value}

Town of Birth: {!Town_of_Birth}

Have you previously had any change in your Nationality?

{!Nationality_Changed.value}

Your current UK address:

{!Get_Candidate.MailingStreet}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingCity}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingState}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingPostalCode}

What date did you move into the above address?

{!What_date_did_you_move_into_your_current_address}

Have you been a resident in as single country out of the UK continuously for 6 months or more in the last 5 years?

{!Previous_Resident.value}

{!PreviousNameVar}

{!PreviousResidentVar}

{!PreviousAddressVar}

{!PreviousNationalityVar}


Criminal Record Information

A Criminal Conviction means any offence that you were found guilty of committing by Court or Court Martial including motoring offences even if you did not attend. Answering yes does not mean that Royal Mail Group cannot consider you for the role. Please note you should declare any motoring offences which resulted in fines, points on your Driving License in the last 5 years or custodial sentences which remain unspent in line with the Rehabilitation of Offenders Act 1974.

Have you ever been convicted of any criminal offence which is currently unspent?

{!Criminal_Conviciton.value}

What was the nature of offence?

{!Criminal_Conviction_Nature}

What was the date of the offence?

{!Criminal_Conviction_Date}

What was the sentence or court order?

{!Criminal_Conviction_Sentance}


Do you have any impending prosecutions including motoring offences?

{!Impending_Prosecution.value}

What is the nature of the offence you are being charged with?

{!Impending_Nature}


Have you been convicted of a motoriong offence within the last 5 years?

{!Motoring_Offences.value}

What is the nature of the motoring offence?

{!Motoring_Nature}

What was the date of the motoring offence?

{!Motoring_date}

What was the sentence or court order?

{!Motoring_Sentance}


I acknowledge that Royal Mail Group (RMG) will carry out an eligibility check and security checks, including a basic disclosure check through The Disclosure & Barring Service, Disclosure Scotland or Access Northern Ireland using the data supplied during this application; and these security checks may be audited by RMG or a third party that is approved by RMG (personal data will be exchanged electronically between this parties).A basic disclosure certificate will contain information about any unspent convictions held in your name or confirm that no such unspent convictions exist.


Further information on basic disclosures can be found at Disclosure&Barring Service, Disclosure Scotland and Access Northern Ireland.


Any consent given will last for a period of twelve months from the date of this application.


Please follow the link below and review the list of offences which would be deemed as unacceptable to Royal Mail Group and therefore prevent us from taking your application further.


Criminal Convictions - List of Unacceptable (royalmailgroup.com)


Should any of the listed convictions be identified as part of the basic disclosure check, your certificate will be reviewed, and your offer of employment may be withdrawn.


Royal Mail Group has an ex-offender’s policy, which is available on request by contacting hrsc.security.vetting@royalmail.com if required (please note this email address will only be able to respond to request for this policy).



  • I can confirm I am the person listed in this application and have provided complete and true information in support of the application and I understand that knowingly making a false statement for this purpose is a criminal offence.

Confirmation: Yes

  • I consent for RMG to receive and open my basic disclosure certificate prior to me seeing it, for the purpose of assessing my application for employment and other recruitment management purposes. Where applicable, I give consent for RMG to assess and retain a copy of my Overseas Criminal Record Check provided by me.

Consent given: Yes

  • I have read the Basic DBS Check Privacy Policy for applicants and I understand how DBS will process my personal data.

Acknowledgment: Yes

  • I consent to the DBS providing an electronic result directly to the responsible organisation that has submitted my application. I understand that an electronic result contains a message that indicates either the certificate does not contain criminal record information or to await certificate which will indicate that my certificate contains criminal record information. In some cases the responsible organisation may provide this information directly to my employer prior to me receiving my certificate. I understand if I do not consent to an electronic result being issued to the responsible organisation submitting my application that I must not proceed with this application and I should apply directly to DBS Request a basic DBS check - GOV.UK (www.gov.uk). I understand that to withdraw my consent whilst my application is in progress, I must contact the DBS helpline 03000 200 190. My application will then be withdrawn.

Consent given: Yes

  • Following the above statement, I understand that should I wish NOT to provide consent I will contact my employer to withdraw my application.

Acknowledgment: Yes

  • I acknowledge that a copy of my Basic Disclosure Certificate will be retained in line with RMG’s retention guidelines or in my personnel file if deemed a requirement for the role under current CAA regulations. *UK Single Consolidated Direction, Chapter 11 (Recruitment & Training). Further information in relation to current CAA regulations can be found at: https://www.caa.co.uk/Commercial-industry/Security/Regulation/Criminal-record-checks/

Acknowledgment: Yes



Signed By: {!Get_Candidate.Name}

Signed Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}

textTemplates.name: PreviousAddress2
textTemplates.text:
{!Address_Name}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingStreet}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingCity}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingPostalCode}

{!Get_Candidate.MailingCountry}

Resident From: {!What_date_did_you_move_into_your_current_address}

Resident Until: {!$Flow.CurrentDate}

textTemplates.text:
{!Address_Name}

{!Address_Line_1}

{!Address_Line_2}

{!Postal_Town}

{!Previous_Country.value}

Which date did you move into this address?

Which date did you move out of this address?

{!Resident_Until_Var}

textTemplates.name: PreviousForenameText
textTemplates.text:
What was your previous Forename?

{!Previous_First_Name}

What date was this changed?

{!First_Name_Changed}

textTemplates.name: PreviousNationalityText

What was your previous nationality?

What date did your nationality Change?

textTemplates.name: PreviousResidentText
textTemplates.text:
What was your previous resident country?

{!Country_List.value}

When where you a resident from?

{!Resident_Start}

When where you a resident until?

{!Resident_End}

textTemplates.name: PreviousSurnameText
textTemplates.text:
What was your previous surname?

{!Previous_Surname}

What date was this changed?

{!Surname_Changed}
